Window.Title: Track working time
Header.Title: Working time booking
ClockSection.Title: Booking
Settings.TraySupportHint: Supported on Linux and Windows. Net time is shown in the tray context menu.
Settings.CountStampedOutBreak: Count clocked-out time towards mandatory break
Settings.BreakRulesFormat: Format: If working time >= MinWorkedHours, deduct DeductedBreakHours.
Tray.HintBody: You can reopen or exit HoursBooking from the tray icon.
DesiredEnd.ReachesAt: Desired working time reached at about {0:HH:mm}
SegmentEdit.SelectToAdjust: Select a work segment to adjust its times.
SegmentEdit.AdjustAndApply: Adjust the times and apply the changes.
SegmentEdit.SelectFirst: Please select a work segment first.
SegmentEdit.EndBeforeStart: End time must not be before the start time.
SegmentEdit.CompletedNeedsEnd: A finished segment requires an end time.
SegmentEdit.Overlap: The edited segment overlaps with another work segment.
Alert.MaxExceeded: Maximum net working time exceeded by {0:F0} minutes.
Alert.ErrorRemaining: Only {0:F0} minutes left until the maximum net working time.
